name: polygres
description: Operate, design, build, and troubleshoot Polygres through public CLI and SDK workflows.

interface.longDescription: Operate projects with the public CLI, design reviewable retrieval plans, build applications with the Python SDK, and diagnose failures from public read-only evidence.
defaultPrompt: Review and safely apply this Polygres import or migration through the CLI.
Design and implement Polygres retrieval in my application.
Diagnose this Polygres project or retrieval failure safely.
